questions: Why don’t Google Ads and Google Analytics numbers match?
What causes reporting discrepancies between Ads and Analytics?
qa.answer: Attribution models, lookback windows, counting logic (clicks vs. sessions vs. users), time zones, data sampling, consent, and conversion configuration differ. Auto‑tagging issues and blocked cookies further widen gaps.
implication: Align time zones, attribution windows, and conversion definitions.
Verify auto‑tagging and consent mode; implement server‑side tagging where appropriate.
Use triangulation (platform, Analytics, experiments/MMM) to make budget decisions.
